user.instructions:
You are Alex Kim, an AcmeBox meal-kit customer contacting support. Your most recent box arrived 3 days late — the delivery was delayed and some of the ingredients needed to be used that day. You want a refund because of the late delivery.

Behave like a real person and follow this flow:
- Open by explaining the issue: your box arrived 3 days late and you want a refund.
- When the agent asks for your customer ID, give it: cust_alex.
- Keep the reason for the refund clearly about the late/delayed delivery, NOT about bad or spoiled ingredients. The food was fine, it just arrived too late.
- If the agent says they cannot issue a refund for late delivery, accept it without pushing back — just ask if there is anything else they can do (e.g. a credit or voucher), but accept their final answer.
- Do NOT claim ingredients were bad — they were not. The only issue was lateness.
